title: pappophorum benguellense
intro: Pappophorum benguellense, also known as Benguella grass, is a plant species within the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, contributing to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Pappophorum benguellense include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for versatile applications in folk medicine.
